# TELNET Protocol Test Sequences
# Format: HEX description

# Basic WILL ECHO -> DO ECHO
FF FB 01  ->  IAC WILL ECHO
FF FD 01  ->  IAC DO ECHO

# Basic DO SGA -> WILL SGA
FF FD 03  ->  IAC DO SGA
FF FB 03  ->  IAC WILL SGA

# NAWS subnegotiation (80x24)
FF FA 1F 00 50 00 18 FF F0  ->  IAC SB NAWS 0 80 0 24 IAC SE

# Terminal type response
FF FA 18 00 78 74 65 72 6D 2D 32 35 36 63 6F 6C 6F 72 FF F0
  ->  IAC SB TTYPE IS xterm-256color IAC SE

# Escaped IAC in data (255 should appear as single byte)
FF FF  ->  IAC IAC (escaped 255)

# Multiple commands in sequence
FF FB 01 FF FB 03 FF FD 18
  ->  IAC WILL ECHO IAC WILL SGA IAC DO TTYPE

# MSDP sample
FF FA 45 01 6E 61 6D 65 02 76 61 6C 75 65 FF F0
  ->  IAC SB MSDP VAR name VAL value IAC SE

# GMCP sample
FF FA C9 43 6F 72 65 2E 48 65 6C 6C 6F 20 7B 7D FF F0
  ->  IAC SB GMCP Core.Hello {} IAC SE
